body:
## Rationale

**Same bug class as #1703 and #1780.** Issue #1415 created 8 per-brand LLM markdown files in \`public/llms/brands/\` — but **never added sitemap entries**. AI crawlers cannot discover them. The sitemap has \`/brands/<slug>\` (page URLs) but not \`/llms/brands/<slug>.md\` (LLM markdown URLs).

## Confirmed gap

\`\`\`bash
ls public/llms/brands/
# dw.md  ludwig.md  mapex.md  meinl.md  paiste.md  pearl.md  tama.md  zildjian.md
\`\`\`

\`\`\`bash
grep "llms/brands" api/sitemap.js
# (no output — zero sitemap entries)
\`\`\`

## Fix

**File:** \`api/sitemap.js\`

Add near the \`/llms/endorsements/\` block (around line 541):

\`\`\`js
// Issue #NNNN: per-brand LLM markdown — sitemap entries for 8 files shipped in #1415
...gearBrands.map(b => ({ loc: \`/llms/brands/\${b.slug}.md\`, priority: '0.5', changefreq: 'monthly' })),
\`\`\`

\`gearBrands\` is already defined in sitemap.js (line ~140) with 8 entries.

**Note:** \`public/llms/brands/mapex.md\` exists but \`mapex\` is not in \`gearBrands\`. And \`sabian\` is in gearBrands but has no file yet. The sitemap line should use \`gearBrands\` as source-of-truth and create \`sabian.md\` as a stub if missing.

## Expected impact

- 8 AI-crawlable brand LLM URLs added to sitemap
- Fills brand-authority axis in LLM citation surface (Tama, Pearl, DW, Ludwig, Zildjian, Paiste, Meinl, Sabian)
- Compound with existing /brands/<slug> pages (purchase intent) + /llms/gear-by-brand.md

## Verify

1. \`grep "llms/brands" api/sitemap.js | wc -l\` returns 8
2. \`/sitemap.xml\` contains \`/llms/brands/tama.md\`
3. GET \`/llms/brands/tama.md\` returns 200 (file already exists)
4. Create \`public/llms/brands/sabian.md\` stub if it doesn't exist (≥100 words)
5. GSC → Coverage → Valid → new brand LLM URLs indexed within 1-2 weeks

## Done

When sitemap.js generates 8 \`/llms/brands/<slug>.md\` entries.
title: SEO: /llms/brands/ — 8 brand LLM files exist but absent from sitemap (AI crawlers blind)
